package.name: kachaka_autoware_vehicle_interface
package.description: Pure-logic libraries used by the Kachaka Autoware vehicle interface: Ackermann-to-differential-drive twist conversion, operation-mode state machine, and odometry-to-VelocityReport conversion. The rclcpp Node that wires these into ROS I/O is added by a follow-up PR.
package.author: Yutaka Kondo
